reviews.comment:
Le doy 3 estrellas xq hay q hacer largas filas, la espera es horrible, pobre del placero, xq hay uno solo y tiene q ofrecerte hasta la limpieza del parabrisas, aunq haya una larguisima cola.

(Translated by Google)
I'm giving it 3 stars because there are long lines, the wait is horrible, and the parking attendant is miserable because there's only one and he has to offer you everything, even windshield cleaning, even if there's a very long queue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTazh6ZHJ3RRAB
